mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.requirement_no, r.title, r.org_id, r.dept_id, r.position_id, r.headcount, r.urgency_level, r.requirement_status, r.expected_entry_date, r.reason, r.industry_type, r.ext_json, r.remark, r.created_time, r.updated_time, o.name as orgName, d.name as deptName, p.name as positionName FROM hr_recruit_requirement r LEFT JOIN hr_organization o ON r.org_id = o.id LEFT JOIN hr_department d ON r.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN hr_position p ON r.position_id = p.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT CONCAT( CASE #{industryType} WHEN 'company' THEN 'REQ' WHEN 'hospital' THEN 'HREQ' ELSE 'REQ' END, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), LPAD(COUNT(*) + 1, 3, '0') ) as requirementNo FROM hr_recruit_requirement WHERE DATE(created_time) = CURDATE() AND industry_type = #{industryType} AND deleted = 0
